---
title: "test_phase_88_neural_api.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_neural_api.test.ts"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.65
style_score: 9.30
intel_score: 6.20
overall_score: 8.23
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://vitest)
- [expect](file://vitest)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [saveTrace](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [getDb](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [registry](file://../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `testFile`
- `missionId`
- `traces`
- `target`
